Create a comment on a post

Send or withdraw a connection request
Check availability of a profile slug

Invite a member to a space
Ban a member from a space

Remove a member from a space
List spaces the current user belongs to
Full-text search across posts, users, spaces, hashtags
Trigger reindex for a content type (admin)

tables.name: bn_activity_log
tables.purpose: Audit log of all community activity events

tables.name: bn_announcement_dismissals
tables.purpose: Tracks which users have dismissed which announcements

tables.name: bn_appeals
tables.purpose: Moderation appeals submitted by users against strikes/suspensions

tables.name: bn_connections
tables.purpose: Bilateral connection requests and accepted connections

tables.name: bn_email_log
tables.purpose: Sent email history for audit and debugging

tables.name: bn_email_templates
tables.purpose: Customisable email templates seeded at activation

tables.name: bn_feed_items
tables.purpose: Denormalised feed item cache used for home/profile feed rendering

tables.name: bn_hashtags
tables.purpose: Hashtag definitions with usage counters and trending score

tables.name: bn_notification_prefs
tables.purpose: Per-user notification delivery preferences by event type

tables.name: bn_post_hashtags
tables.purpose: Many-to-many join table for posts and hashtags

tables.name: bn_search_index
tables.purpose: Full-text search index with FULLTEXT key on title+content

tables.name: bn_space_members
tables.purpose: Space membership rows with role and status

tables.name: bn_user_abilities
tables.purpose: Explicit ability grants per user with optional expiry

tables.name: bn_webhook_log
tables.purpose: General webhook log (alias of outbound_webhook_log for legacy compatibility)

services.purpose: WP Abilities API registration for all BuddyNext capabilities
Content safety pre-checks (keyword filter, rate limits)
Poll creation, vote recording, result aggregation
Profile field read/write and completion scoring
Avatar upload, storage, and initials-SVG fallback
Full-text search queries and background reindex
Hooks to async index on post/profile/space create/update
Compose human-readable notification copy + deep-link URL + icon for every type
Custom member type CRUD and user assignment
Template loading with theme override support
PWA manifest and push notification subscription endpoints
Outbound webhook dispatch and cron retry
Email verification token generation and validation
Community invite token generation and claim
Realtime transport abstraction (polling fallback or WebSocket when configured)

capabilities.name: manage_options
capabilities.usage: admin gate for admin pages and elevated REST actions
